name: Synup Social vs. SocialPilot
hero_summary: Stop managing your social media with guesswork. While SocialPilot is nice for scheduling posts, it’s the Spirit Airlines of social media management platforms: everything is up to chance. Start making data-driven decisions with Synup Social. With a revolutionary analytics platform, you can see exactly which posts are driving day-to-day engagement. Plus, we’ll help you create more of your best content with our AI-powered post ideas. Let’s grow together!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Make data-driven decisions for unmatched growth. With Synup Social, you can power your social media strategy with revolutionary analytics. We’ll guide your posting strategy, so you can smash your engagement goals. Get the ease of scheduling you love while creating better, more impactful content. Here’s how we do it:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Change your workflow with automation and collaboration tools
section_2_slider_1_summary: Post scheduling is just the beginning! Make your life a lot easier with Synup Social in your tool belt. Remove friction from social media management every step of the way and collaborate with your team and your clients. It all starts with a revolutionary approval workflow where you and your team can create drafts, edit each other's work, and get feedback and approval from your supervisors. Save yourself the headache of back-and-forth edits with Synup Social!
section_2_slider_2_summary: SocialPilot and Synup Social are both built with agencies in mind, but with revolutionary white-labeling on everything from social media calendars to analytics reports, Synup Social is the clear choice. With shareable links that empower your clients to view post-by-post analytics, comment on your content calendar, approve posts, and even connect their social accounts to the platform, you can ditch your spreadsheets and build an efficient workflow in no time.
section_2_slider_3_heading: Helpful post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_step_3_summary: From intuitive approval workflows to advanced collaboration, join forces with your team or your customers to create a content calendar that everyone can get behind. With AI-powered post creation, you’ll be inspired to create your best posts yet! We supply on-trend suggestions that align with your brand image; and the more you use it, the better it gets. Goodbye, writers’ block!
section_2_slider_4_summary: SocialPilot doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation OR strategy. Synup Social helps you grow. We’ll help you craft a winning strategy - and give you all the credit! AI-powered insights empower you to create a data-driven posting strategy that engages your audience and smashes your KPIs. From the best time to post to post-by-post analytics, you’ll have the insights you need to smash your goals.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over SocialPilot?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Saving time and money on a better product? Sign us up! Synup Social inspires your team, empowers you to build better workflows, and delivers results with revolutionary analytics. No matter your goal, Synup Social is the perfect choice for agencies and brands alike! After all, With advanced insights that guide you from post creation to analytics, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed. Let’s see how it stacks up against SocialPilot:
